monitor.capture_what: The first argument (location/URL) passed to flask.redirect, which contains the untrusted cookie value after base64 round-trip

oracle_check.condition_description: The location argument passed to flask.redirect contains an absolute URL pointing to an external domain (http:// or https://), confirming the open redirect vulnerability
oracle_check.raise_message_template: URL_REDIRECTION: Open redirect — untrusted cookie value reaches flask.redirect() without validation — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
